positive: A detailed scientific illustration of exotic tropical foliage, including monstera leaves, banana leaves, and fern fronds. The style must resemble a vintage botanical engraving, rendered with fine cross-hatching and a muted palette of deep forest greens and cream paper. High contrast, highly detailed, natural history plate.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, digital painting, messy lines
